name: dns-manager
trigger: User needs DNS record creation, CNAME setup, OVH API management, or domain name resolution.

name: docker-manager
trigger: User needs to deploy, start, stop, restart, or manage Docker stacks via Portainer.

name: proxy-configurator
trigger: User needs Caddy reverse proxy configuration, TLS setup, or Caddy reload.

name: homepage-publisher
trigger: User needs to publish a service to the homepage dashboard or update service widgets.
